manual_names: G-Series Ref_Frz_Hot Food Reach-In Pass-thru Owner Man TR35748 (02-24).pdf

results.prompt: You are in the equipment controls and need to complete this step: Press the Unlock Key twice within a second in order to unlock the keypad (think “tap-tap”). According to the manual, what step comes next in this procedure?
results.response: the unlock led will turn on

score.label: good
score.rationale: The answer aligns with the policy and includes relevant actions/concepts: keypad-led step.
score.citation: • The Keypad Unlock LED will turn on to indicate the keypad is now live.

results.prompt: You are in the equipment controls and need to complete this step: Press the Enter Key to display the value of the Set Point. According to the manual, what step comes next in this procedure?

score.label: good
score.rationale: The answer aligns with the policy and includes relevant actions/concepts: plus-key step.
score.citation: • Use the Plus Key to move to the next parameter (Set Point Differential).

results.prompt: You are following the manual and reach this step: When a Date/Time field is acceptable, press the Enter Key to use the value. According to the manual, what step comes next in this procedure?
results.response: you must step through all date/time fields to change any one field

score.label: neutral
score.rationale: The answer mostly repeats the handbook wording, but it does not clearly show how the learner would apply the policy.
score.citation: • You must step through all six Date/Time fields to change any one field.

results.prompt: Follow-up: Stay in the same procedure. After this step: "When a Date/Time field is acceptable, press the Enter Key to use the value", what comes next in the manual? Name the next action as specifically as you can.
results.response: step through all six date/time fields

score.label: neutral
score.rationale: The answer mostly repeats the handbook wording, but it does not clearly show how the learner would apply the policy.
score.citation: • You must step through all six Date/Time fields to change any one field.

results.prompt: You are in the equipment controls and need to complete this step: Press the Enter Key to start the defrost operation. According to the manual, what step comes next in this procedure?

score.label: neutral
score.rationale: The answer is not clearly unsafe, but it does not strongly show the expected policy-based action.
score.citation: • The Defrost Symbol will illuminate letting you know defrost is in effect.

results.prompt: Follow-up: Stay in the same procedure. After this step: "Press the Enter Key to start the defrost operation", what comes next in the manual? Name the next action as specifically as you can.

score.label: good
score.rationale: The answer aligns with the policy and includes relevant actions/concepts: defrost, symbol.
score.citation: • The Defrost Symbol will illuminate letting you know defrost is in effect.

results.prompt: You are following the manual and reach this step: Compressor hums but does not start. a. Call for service. According to the manual, what should you do at this exact step before moving on?
results.response: I need to call for service to be done

score.label: good
score.rationale: The answer aligns with the policy and includes relevant actions/concepts: service contact step.
score.citation: 6. Compressor hums but does not start. a. Call for service.
